clo_definitions.CLO01: Elucidate the basic knowledge of Algorithms and Problem Analysis.
clo_definitions.CLO02: Apply programming constructs of C language to solve the real-world problems.
clo_definitions.CLO03: Explore user-defined data structures like arrays, structures and pointers in implementing solutions to problems.
clo_definitions.CLO04: Design and Develop Solutions to problems using modular programming constructs such as functions and procedures.
clo_definitions.CLO05: Integrate Artificial intelligence in C Programming Language

mappings.topic: Conditional Statements: If statement, if-else statement, if statement mistakes, nested if statements, Conditional Operator, Switch statement
More on Loops: Nested for loops, Printing patterns with loops
Arrays Concept introduction, 1 D array: declaration, initialization, Traversal, input/output operation, problem solving
2 D array: Declaration, Initialization, traversal, input/output operation, Matrix Addition and Transpose
String Working and manipulation of strings using user defined code and intrinsic functions
Functions: Definition of a Function, Types – Library and User Defined Functions. Function declarations, Function Definition, Arguments, Function call (call by value and reference, Recursion
mappings.description: Storage Classes: Storage classes- auto, extern, static and register

mappings.topic: Storage Classes: Storage classes- auto, extern, static and register
User Defined Data Types Structures and Unions: Declaring & initializing structures, Array of structures, Nested Structures, Pointers and structures,. Difference between Structure and union
Brief introduction about self-referential structures, Typdef, enumerated,
Dynamic Memory Allocation: Memory Management Functions—using malloc(), calloc(), realloc(), and free() from <stdlib.h>

File Handling and its Operations: Introduction to Files, Their Importance and Need, Steps in processing a file, File opening modes, Input and output operations of text files, Direct/Random Access functions (fseek, ftell, rewind).
